subcodes.first_line: The mercy of God, from the presence of the Primal Point, hath verily been revealed in truth upon the Temple of Words in the Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رحمه الله من لدن نقطه الاولی قد کانت علی هیکل الکلمات علی الحق فی الالواح منزولا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @idolatry, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the power of words; of speech, @rejection, opposition and persecution
